name: Exempt-Interest Dividends Exclusion

eligibility.description: Available to shareholders of mutual funds or other RICs that invest primarily in tax-exempt municipal bonds and meet the 50% asset threshold.

description: Shareholders of a Regulated Investment Company (RIC) can exclude from gross income dividends that the RIC reports as exempt-interest dividends, provided the RIC holds at least 50% of its assets in tax-exempt obligations.
